final:
// // This SRAM cell has a data input, a data output, a write disable signal, and a clock signal. When the write disable signal is high, the data input should be written to the SRAM cell on the falling edge of the clock. When write disable is low, the SRAM cell should output the stored data on the data output signal.
module sram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,           // Write Enable
    input wire [15:0] din,  // Data Input
    output reg [15:0] dout   // Data Output
);
    reg [15:0] memory;       // 16-bit memory storage

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory <= din;    // Write operation
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        dout = memory;        // Read operation
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This SRAM cell has a data input, a data output, a write disable signal, and a clock signal. When the write disable signal is high, the data input should be written to the SRAM cell on the falling edge of the clock. When write disable is low, the SRAM cell should output the stored data on the data output signal.
